title: snowdenia scabra
intro: Snowdenia scabra, also known as the rough snowdonia, is a flowering plant species in the family Ranunculaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Snowdenia scabra can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its leaves and roots can be used to make topical creams and ointments for skin conditions like eczema and acne.
